items.name: SCP-610 Containment Backpack

This SCP-610 containment backpack is only available in the SCP: Area-02 Halloween Update! Link: https://www.roblox.com/games/2808131030/ to obtain this item in-game you must have gotten at least 35% damage done to the headless horseman boss roaming random areas of the map in addition to 3 hours of play time in-game.
